title: cistus × longifolius subsp. grosii
intro: Cistus × longifolius subsp. grosii, also known as rockrose, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the genus Cistus, which is a type of flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cistus × longifolius subsp. grosii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
